purpose: Auditable inventory after the frontend latest-only boundary cut. The removed full-designer tree is migration history, not a production or test dependency.

migrationInputs.reason: The old persisted input shape is required by the one-time document migration.

Converts persisted legacy input into the current DesignerDocument and DesignerEditorSession plus an explicitly marked runtimeArtifactDraft. Only the latest compiler creates the formal RuntimeArtifact with required integrityPayload, artifactHash, and signature; migration has no dual-write or runtime compatibility behavior.

ui.reason: Replaced by low-code-studio PageStudioHost, Canvas, Inspector, Binding, Layout, Responsive, and Shortcut modules.

registryAndManifest.reason: Replaced by low-code-studio/components/ComponentRegistry and latestComponentManifestCatalog plus runtime-kernel/RuntimeComponentRegistry.

renderers.reason: The old renderer tree duplicated runtime behavior and is physically removed.

inspectorAndBinding.reason: Replaced by low-code-studio/inspector, binding, expression, and workflow binding modules.

parserValidatorCompilerBranch.reason: The latest document codec, validator, store, command bus, and runtime artifact boundary are authoritative.

oldSemanticsTests.reason: Tests coupled to the removed implementation were deleted; latest behavior is covered by low-code-studio and runtime-kernel tests, including the rewritten runtime parity test.

migrationPlan.source: persisted document input typed by LegacyDocumentInput
steps: map legacy resource expressions to ResourceRef
compile the document into a signed formal RuntimeArtifact

outputContract.restartRecovery: expired Running runs are marked Failed with migration.interrupted before retry; retry is idempotent from the immutable backup
outputContract.directPageReadBoundary: the migration boundary rewrites LayoutDraftJson and SchemaDraftJson to the latest canonical document and sets DesignerMode to structured so GET /pages/{id} cannot return editor-state fields
